word: H6947 - קָדֵשׁ בַּרְנֵעַ - Qâdêsh Barnêaʻ - kaw-dashe' bar-nay'-ah - Kadeshbarnea

sections.paragraph:
Original: קדשׁ בּרנע

Transliteration: qâdêsh barnêa‛

Phonetic: kaw-dashe' bar-nay'-ah

BDB Definition:

Kadesh-barnea = "holy"
  1. a city in the extreme south of Judah
    1. same as 'Kedesh' and 'Kadesh'

Origin: from the same as H6946 and an otherwise unused word (apparently compounded of a correspondent to H1251 and a derivative of H5128) meaning desert of a fugitive

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
